title: senecio clusii
intro: Senecio clusii, also known as Clusius's ragwort, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Senecio clusii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. Senecio clusii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
